zh.Tylcha, Glam., Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ap Morgan於大約1451年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾勒時，他的父親Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan26歲，母親Jane ferch John-110歲。他於1475年與Jonet ferch Hywel在威爾士卡馬特史爾卡素 格林 卡馬特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn ap Morgan于大约1451年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾勒时，他的父亲Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan26岁，母亲Jane ferch John-110岁。他于1475年与Jonet ferch Hywel在威尔士卡馬特史爾卡素 格林 卡馬特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ap Morgan was born about 1451, in Penllech, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan, was 26 and his mother, Jane ferch John, was -110. He married Jonet ferch Hywel in 1475, in Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

Il a épousé Jonet ferch Hywel en 1475, à Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn ap Morgan um 1451 in Penllech, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan 26 und seine Mutter Jane ferch John -110. Er hat 1475 in Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales Jonet ferch Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Morgan è nato il circa 1451 nel Penllech, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jane ferch John, aveva -110 anni. Lui sposato Jonet ferch Hywel nel 1475, nel Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Morganが約1451年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンレチで生まれた時，父Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morganは26歳，母Jane ferch Johnは-110歳であった。1475年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカストル グレン カーマースンでJonet ferch Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Morgan(이)가 대략 1451년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜렉h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane ferch John(은)는 -110세였다. 그는 1475년 웨일스 카마테실르 카스틀 그린 카마테에서 Jonet ferch Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ap Morgan родился около 1451 г. в местности пенллеч, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane ferch John, -110. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet ferch Hywel в 1475 г. в местности кастл грин кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn ap Morgan nació aproximadamente 1451, en Penllech, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Morgan Ap Ievan Ab Morgan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane ferch John, tenía -110 años. Se casó con Jonet ferch Hywel en 1475, en Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
